name: Roadmap Tradeoff Engine
persona: A Head of Product at a 50–300 person B2B SaaS company running a quarterly roadmap tradeoff meeting with fixed engineering capacity and imperfect estimates
problem_statement: In roadmap planning, leaders must choose a set of initiatives under tight capacity but can’t clearly explain what gets cut and why when constraints change
artifact_type: single-page web app with a three-column layout and live scenario A/B comparison driven by a constraint-based selection engine
